name: Shrimp-Cheese Roll
recipeIngredient: Optional: 1 Egg yolk mixed with 1 tablespoon water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together Muenster cheese, shrimp, onion, salt, pepper, and eggs; set aside.
2. Unroll the crescent roll dough onto a lightly floured surface.
3. Pinch together the perforations on both sides of the dough.
4. Fold in half crosswise and with a lightly floured rolling pin, roll out to a 14x9 inch rectangle.
5. Brush the dough with butter.
6. Spread the cheese-shrimp mixture in a 2-inch strip along one long edge of the dough.
7. Roll up the dough tightly into a log.
8. Firmly pinch the seam and ends together.
9. Lightly moisten the roll with water to seal, then smooth lightly with the dull edge of a knife.
10. Place the roll on an ungreased baking sheet.
11. Brush the top with egg-yolk mixture.
12. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
13. Cool on a rack for 20 minutes.
14. Cut into 1/2-inch slices. Makes 28.
